title: HIVE Digital Technologies Exceeds 12 EH/s Milestone, Achieves $250 Million Annual Run Rate Revenue as Paraguay Expansion Progresses
text: HIVE Digital Technologies announced it has doubled its Bitcoin mining hashrate to 12 exahash per second (EH/s) since the beginning of 2025 and achieved a $250 million annualized revenue rate. The company is rapidly expanding its hydro-powered data center operations in Yguazú, Paraguay. Phase 2 deployment at the Paraguay site now includes 1 EH/s of Bitmain S21+ Hydro ASIC miners, with full deployment expected to reach 6.5 EH/s by late August. The company targets 18 EH/s by summer's end and 25 EH/s by Thanksgiving 2025. Current mining operations produce over 6 BTC daily with approximately 55% mining margins. At 18 EH/s, management projects approximately $400 million in annual run rate revenue with 60% mining margins expected. CEO Aydin Kilic stated the company operates Phase 2 is already online and hashing efficiently with 20 J/TH fleet performance. The expansion has generated local employment and community benefits including street lighting and school infrastructure improvements in the region.
